sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd Invests $1.82 Million in Kimco Realty Corporation $KIM
feed.summary: Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd has made a significant investment in Kimco Realty Corporation, acquiring a new stake of 83,349 shares valued at approximately $1.82 million during the third quarter. This move aligns with other institutional investors who have also adjusted their positions in KIM. Analysts generally hold a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating for Kimco Realty, with an average price target of $23.89.

feed.title: ServiceNow (NOW) CEO Just Doesn’t Miss Quarters, Says Jim Cramer
feed.summary: Jim Cramer highlighted ServiceNow (NYSE:NOW) CEO Bill McDermott's consistent performance, noting that he "doesn't miss quarters" despite the stock's recent struggles. The shares have fallen significantly over the past year due to a broader downturn in the enterprise software sector, exacerbated by AI advancements. Analyst firms like BMO Capital, Cantor Fitzgerald, and Jefferies have reiterated positive ratings but cut price targets, citing "multiple compression" yet underscoring limited downside risk for the company.

feed.title: Honeywell International Inc. (NASDAQ:HON) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Honeywell International Inc. (NASDAQ:HON) reported strong Q4 2025 results, exceeding adjusted sales and EPS expectations, driven by 23% order growth and a record $37 billion backlog. The company announced plans to complete the aerospace spin-off in Q3 2026 and accelerate its focus on innovation and high-growth verticals, projecting 6% to 9% earnings growth and accelerating cash generation for 2026. Management also provided detailed segment outlooks for 2026, including modest margin expansion for aerospace and significant productivity-driven margin growth in industrial automation, while addressing pricing strategies and ongoing portfolio simplification.

feed.title: Dover Corporation (NYSE:DOV) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Dover Corporation reported strong Q4 2025 results, with organic growth up 5% and adjusted EPS increasing 14% for the quarter and 16% for the full year. The company provided a constructive outlook for 2026, guiding for adjusted EPS of $10.45 to $10.65 per share, representing double-digit growth. Management highlighted robust demand across its portfolio, successful capital allocation strategies including acquisitions and share repurchases, and ongoing productivity initiatives contributing to margin expansion.

feed.title: Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd Acquires New Holdings in Arista Networks, Inc. $ANET
feed.summary: Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd has initiated a new position in Arista Networks, acquiring 11,705 shares valued at approximately $1.706 million in the third quarter. Other institutional investors also adjusted their holdings, and analysts currently rate ANET as a "Moderate Buy" with an average target price of $164.44. Despite recent insider selling totaling over $27 million, institutional investors collectively own about 82.47% of the company's stock.

feed.title: Valero Energy Corporation (NYSE:VLO) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Valero Energy Corporation announced its Q4 2025 earnings, surpassing expectations with an EPS of $3.82. The company highlighted record refining throughput and ethanol production, emphasizing strong operational performance and a disciplined capital allocation framework including increased dividends and share repurchases. Discussion also covered market dynamics like West Coast refining, Venezuelan crude impacts, and the ongoing policy uncertainties for renewable diesel and ethanol, with Valero poised to benefit from favorable conditions.

feed.title: Parker-Hannifin Corporation (NYSE:PH) Q2 2026 earnings call transcript
feed.summary: This is the Q2 2026 earnings call transcript for Parker-Hannifin Corporation (NYSE:PH). The transcript details the company's financial performance and discusses future outlook as presented during the earnings call. It provides insights into management's perspective on the quarter's results.

feed.title: Norfolk Southern Corporation (NYSE:NSC) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Norfolk Southern Corporation exceeded Q4 2025 earnings expectations with a reported EPS of $3.22 against an expectation of $2.76. The company highlighted strong safety performance, including zero reportable mainline derailments in Q4, and significant productivity gains in 2025, moving 3% more GTMs with 4% fewer employees. Despite a soft demand environment and competitive pressures related to a pending merger, NSC plans to prioritize safety, service, and cost control in 2026, targeting $150 million in cost savings and a capital expenditure of $1.9 billion.

feed.title: Altria Group, Inc. (NYSE:MO) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Altria Group, Inc. reported its Q4 and full-year 2025 earnings, with adjusted diluted EPS growing by 4.4% for the year, and an outlook for 2026 adjusted diluted EPS between $5.56 and $5.72. The company highlighted strategic progress in its smoke-free portfolio, including FDA authorizations for ON! PLUS products and advancements in international modern oral initiatives. Challenges included the impact of illicit flavored disposable e-vapor products on the market and competitive pricing in the nicotine pouch category.

feed.title: 4,659 Shares in The Home Depot, Inc. $HD Acquired by Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd
feed.summary: Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd recently acquired 4,659 shares of The Home Depot (NYSE:HD) in Q3, a stake valued at approximately $1.888 million. This acquisition occurred despite Home Depot missing EPS estimates in its latest quarter, though revenue exceeded expectations. Meanwhile, several Home Depot executives sold shares totaling about $1.75 million in the past three months.

feed.title: Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd Has $1.74 Million Stake in Cenovus Energy Inc $CVE
feed.summary: Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd significantly reduced its stake in Cenovus Energy Inc. by 44.2% in the third quarter, selling 81,170 shares and retaining 102,294 shares valued at approximately $1.74 million. Other institutional investors, such as Fiducient Advisors LLC, Avidian Wealth Enterprises LLC, Triasima Portfolio Management Inc., Dynasty Wealth Management LLC, and JCIC Asset Management Inc., either newly acquired or increased their holdings in Cenovus Energy during the same period. Despite this, Cenovus Energy reported strong Q3 EPS of $0.52, surpassing the consensus of $0.40, and maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts with an average price target of $27.00.

feed.title: Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd Takes $1.69 Million Position in Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings Ltd. $NCLH
feed.summary: Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd recently acquired a new stake of 68,726 shares, valued at approximately $1.69 million, in Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings Ltd. This increases the institutional ownership of NCLH to 69.58%. Several other institutional investors also adjusted their holdings, while company insiders purchased 90,029 shares worth about $1.66 million.

feed.title: 28,064 Shares in International Flavors & Fragrances Inc. $IFF Acquired by Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd
feed.summary: Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd has acquired a new position in International Flavors & Fragrances Inc. (IFF), purchasing 28,064 shares for approximately $1.727 million in the third quarter. This acquisition comes as IFF reported beating Q3 EPS estimates but saw revenue decline by 7.9% year-over-year. Analysts generally hold a "Moderate Buy" rating for IFF, with a consensus target price of $86.46, despite the recent stock decline.

feed.title: Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd Takes $1.84 Million Position in PACCAR Inc. $PCAR
feed.summary: Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd has acquired an initial stake of 18,720 shares in PACCAR Inc. (NASDAQ:PCAR) valued at approximately $1.84 million during the third quarter. This move is part of broader institutional investor activity, with other firms like State Street Corp and JPMorgan Chase & Co. also increasing their holdings in PACCAR. The company, a global technology leader in commercial vehicles, recently announced a quarterly dividend and analysts maintain a "Hold" consensus rating with an average target price of $115.92.

feed.title: A. O. Smith Corporation (NYSE:AOS) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: A. O. Smith Corporation reported Q4 2025 earnings, exceeding expectations with an EPS of $0.896 against an anticipated $0.84. The company achieved record full-year EPS of $3.85, driven by profitability improvements in both North American and Rest of World segments, despite challenges in China and the wholesale residential market. They also discussed the acquisition of Leonard Valve and projected 2026 earnings guidance, emphasizing strategic growth through portfolio management, innovation, and operational excellence.

feed.title: Deckers Outdoor Corporation (NYSE:DECK) Q3 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Deckers Outdoor Corporation (NYSE: DECK) reported an outstanding Q3 2026 performance, with revenue up 7% to $1.96 billion and diluted EPS at a record $3.33, exceeding expectations. The growth was primarily driven by exceptional global demand for HOKA and UGG brands, which saw revenue increases of 18% and 5% respectively, alongside strong gross margins and effective marketplace management. The company raised its full-year fiscal 2026 outlook, anticipating continued revenue growth and a best-in-class operating margin, fueled by strategic investments and strong brand momentum across both DTC and wholesale channels.

feed.title: Chevron Raises Production To Offset Oil Price Decline, Hikes Dividend
feed.summary: Chevron reported mixed Q4 2025 results, with earnings beating expectations but revenue missing. Despite a drop in earnings due to lower crude oil prices, the company increased its worldwide and U.S. production to record levels, aided by the Hess acquisition and new projects. Chevron also announced a 4% increase in its quarterly dividend, reflecting its strong cash flow and commitment to shareholder returns.

feed.title: Ameriprise Financial, Inc. (NYSE:AMP) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Ameriprise Financial (NYSE:AMP) reported a strong Q4 2025 and full-year 2025, with record revenue, earnings, and EPS, driven by effective strategy and client experience. The company saw significant growth in assets under management, administration, and advisement, reaching new highs, and posted double-digit EPS growth. Ameriprise continues to invest in technology, AI, and product solutions while maintaining a strong balance sheet and returning substantial capital to shareholders.

feed.title: The Sherwin-Williams Company (NYSE:SHW) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: The Sherwin-Williams Company (NYSE: SHW) reported strong Q4 2025 results, beating earnings expectations with an EPS of $2.23 against an expected $2.16. The company discussed its full-year 2025 performance, including record sales and adjusted diluted earnings per share, and provided a 2026 outlook with consolidated sales expected to be up a low to mid-single-digit percentage and adjusted diluted EPS in the range of $11.50 to $11.90. Leadership emphasized aggressive pursuit of market share and disciplined cost control amidst a "softer for longer" demand environment, while also reinstating and retroactively restoring the 401(k) matching program for eligible U.S. employees.

feed.title: PulteGroup, Inc. (NYSE:PHM) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: PulteGroup, Inc. reported its Q4 2025 earnings, with President and CEO Ryan Marshall highlighting the company's diversified operating model and strong financial performance despite a challenging year. The company exceeded earnings expectations on several metrics, including generating impressive annual revenues, margins, and earnings. PulteGroup expects continued growth and maintains a positive outlook for 2026, driven by its strategic investments and focus on core homebuilding operations, while also divesting its off-site manufacturing segment.

feed.title: Parker-Hannifin Corporation (NYSE:PH) Q2 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Parker-Hannifin Corporation (NYSE:PH) announced record Q2 2026 earnings, with sales reaching $5.2 billion and adjusted EPS growing 17% to $7.65, surpassing expectations. The company highlighted strong organic growth, margin expansion, and a robust backlog, driven by performance in aerospace and off-highway markets. Parker-Hannifin also provided increased full-year guidance for sales and EPS, anticipating continued strength across its diversified industrial segments and solid progress on the Filtration Group acquisition.

feed.title: Tractor Supply Company (NASDAQ:TSCO) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Tractor Supply Company (NASDAQ:TSCO) reported its Q4 and full fiscal year 2025 earnings, with Q4 diluted EPS of $0.43, missing expectations of $0.46. The company's net sales increased 3.3% to $3.9 billion in Q4, driven by modest growth in average ticket despite moderated discretionary demand and the absence of prior year storm-related sales. For 2026, Tractor Supply expects total sales growth of 4% to 6%, with comparable store sales growth of 1% to 3%, and anticipates operating margin to improve once comp sales move above the low 2% inflection point.

feed.title: Mizuho raises Eastman Chemical stock price target to $75 on higher market multiples
feed.summary: Mizuho has increased its price target for Eastman Chemical (NYSE:EMN) to $75.00 from $68.00, maintaining an Outperform rating despite the company reporting weaker-than-expected Q4 2025 results. The revised target is driven by higher market and peer multiples, with InvestingPro data suggesting a potential 8.7% upside from the current price. Eastman Chemical's adjusted EBIT missed both Mizuho's and consensus estimates due to global sales declines, and its Q1 2026 EPS guidance also fell below expectations amid macroeconomic uncertainty.

feed.title: Fair Isaac Corporation (NYSE:FICO) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Fair Isaac Corporation reported strong financial results for Q1 2026, with revenues up 16% year-over-year to $512 million and non-GAAP EPS of $7.33, exceeding expectations. The company reiterated its fiscal 2026 guidance, citing continued momentum in its Scores business, particularly with the Direct Licensing Program and FICO Score 10T, and strong growth in its Software segment driven by platform adoption and record ACV bookings. Discussions during the call highlighted ongoing complexities in the mortgage market regarding regulatory changes and the potential impact of FICO Score 10T and VantageScore implementation.

feed.title: ResMed Inc. (NYSE:RMD) Q2 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: ResMed Inc. reported strong Q2 fiscal year 2026 earnings with 11% headline revenue growth and 16% GAAP EPS growth, driven by device and mask sales. The company highlighted operational excellence, innovation in AI-enabled devices and new fabric masks, and robust free cash flow generation. Management emphasized the positive impact of GLP-1 medications and big tech wearables in bringing more patients into the sleep apnea treatment funnel, noting increased CPAP adherence among these motivated patients.

feed.title: Southwest Airlines Co. (NYSE:LUV) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Southwest Airlines (NYSE:LUV) reported strong Q4 and full-year 2025 results, with record operating revenues and EBIT exceeding guidance, driven by significant transformation initiatives implemented in 2025. The company forecasts dramatically higher earnings for 2026, with an adjusted EPS of at least $4, emphasizing new product offerings like assigned seating and extra legroom, which are expected to contribute to further revenue growth. Management highlighted operational excellence and a focus on customer choice and efficiency to secure future earnings growth, even without assuming macro snapback or significant share shifts.

feed.title: Waste Management, Inc. (NYSE:WM) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Waste Management, Inc. reported strong Q4 and full-year 2025 results, driven by operational excellence, disciplined pricing, and successful integration of Healthcare Solutions, achieving record operating expenses as a percent of revenue. The company saw significant growth in operating EBITDA and free cash flow, expanded its sustainability businesses with new RNG facilities and recycling upgrades, and announced a 14.5% dividend increase and a new $3 billion share repurchase program for 2026. Management expressed optimism for 2026, forecasting continued EBITDA growth and nearly 30% free cash flow growth, while highlighting ongoing improvements in Healthcare Solutions and strategic capital allocation.

feed.title: United Rentals, Inc. (NYSE:URI) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: United Rentals (NYSE:URI) reported record revenue and EBITDA for 2025, driven by strong growth in both general rental and specialty businesses, particularly from mega-projects in infrastructure, data centers, and power. The company announced plans to repurchase $1.5 billion in shares and increase its quarterly dividend by 10% in 2026, targeting profitable growth despite anticipated elevated repositioning costs. Management highlighted efforts to mitigate these costs and maintain margins, expressing confidence in continued strong demand from large projects for the foreseeable future.

feed.title: Thermo Fisher Scientific Inc. (NYSE:TMO) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Thermo Fisher Scientific Inc. (NYSE:TMO) reported strong Q4 and full-year 2025 results, exceeding earnings expectations with EPS of $6.57. The company's growth was driven by its bioproduction, research and safety market channels, and strategic acquisitions, alongside robust innovation and operational performance. Looking ahead to 2026, Thermo Fisher initiated revenue guidance of $46.3 billion to $47.2 billion, projecting 6% to 8% adjusted EPS growth, banking on continued market leadership and its PPI business system.

feed.title: Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd Invests $1.82 Million in Fidelity National Information Services, Inc. $FIS
feed.summary: Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd recently invested $1.82 million in Fidelity National Information Services (NYSE: FIS) by acquiring 27,606 shares. Despite a consensus "Hold" rating from analysts with an average price target significantly above the current trading price, the company increased its quarterly dividend. FIS also recently exceeded quarterly EPS estimates and provided positive FY2025 EPS guidance.

feed.title: PepsiCo, Inc. $PEP Shares Sold by Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd
feed.summary: Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd significantly reduced its stake in PepsiCo, Inc. ($PEP) during the third quarter, selling 89,873 shares and retaining 11,578 shares valued at approximately $1.63 million. Despite this, other institutional investors increased their positions. PepsiCo recently paid a quarterly dividend of $1.4225, equating to an annual yield of 3.8%, though its payout ratio is elevated at 108.17%. Wall Street maintains a mixed outlook with an average "Hold" rating, though some analysts have recently upgraded their price targets.

feed.title: Eli Lilly & Co (NYSE:LLY) Emerges as a Top GARP Investment Candidate
feed.summary: Eli Lilly & Co (LLY) has been identified as a strong "Growth at a Reasonable Price" (GARP) investment candidate due to its robust growth, particularly in its diabetes and obesity drugs. The company exhibits a high growth score, strong profitability with excellent margins, and while its P/E ratio is high, its valuation appears reasonable when considering its rapid growth and comparison to industry peers. Despite a moderate score in financial strength due to higher debt levels, its overall fundamentals make it an attractive prospect for GARP investors.

feed.title: Church & Dwight (CHD) Raises Quarterly Dividend by 4.2%
feed.summary: Church & Dwight Co Inc (CHD) has announced a 4.2% increase in its quarterly dividend, raising it from 29.5 cents to 30.75 cents per share. The company, a significant player in the Consumer Defensive sector with a $22.08 billion market capitalization, faces slowing revenue growth and declining operating margins despite its strong brand portfolio. Its financial health is generally strong with an Altman Z-Score of 4.81 and a Piotroski F-Score of 7.

feed.title: Townsquare Capital LLC Lowers Holdings in Bank of America Corporation $BAC
feed.summary: Townsquare Capital LLC significantly reduced its stake in Bank of America (NYSE:BAC) by 33.4% in the third quarter, while other institutional investors made smaller adjustments. Despite this, Bank of America reported strong quarterly earnings, beating estimates with a 12.3% year-over-year revenue increase, and analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average $60.00 price target. The article also provides a comprehensive overview of BAC's performance, institutional ownership, recent analyst reports, and market sentiment.

feed.title: Stanley Black & Decker Names Francesca Campbell Senior Vice President, General Counsel
feed.summary: Stanley Black & Decker has appointed Francesca Campbell as its new Senior Vice President, General Counsel, and Corporate Secretary, effective February 16. Campbell previously served as Senior Vice President, Chief Legal Officer at Carrier, bringing extensive experience in legal and compliance functions, mergers and acquisitions, and corporate governance. Her appointment is expected to bolster Stanley Black & Decker's growth strategy and commitment to integrity.

feed.title: PepsiCo, Inc. $PEP Shares Purchased by Townsquare Capital LLC
feed.summary: Townsquare Capital LLC significantly increased its stake in PepsiCo (NASDAQ: PEP) during Q3, boosting its holdings by 96.5% to 40,383 shares valued at approximately $5.67 million. This comes as PepsiCo trades at $148.69 with a 3.8% dividend yield and institutional investors collectively own 73.07% of the company's stock. Analysts generally have a "Hold" consensus rating with an average price target of $159.29, despite recent analyst upgrades.

feed.title: Town & Country Bank & Trust CO dba First Bankers Trust CO Takes Position in Jacobs Solutions Inc. $J
feed.summary: Town & Country Bank & Trust CO dba First Bankers Trust CO has acquired a new position in Jacobs Solutions Inc. (NYSE:J), purchasing 10,972 shares valued at approximately $1.64 million in the third quarter. This move comes as institutional investors now hold a significant 85.65% of the company's stock, with recent insider buying also noted. Jacobs Solutions reported stronger-than-expected EPS and announced a dividend increase, while analysts currently rate the stock as "Hold" with a consensus target price of $156.60.

feed.title: 4,650 Shares in Ecolab Inc. $ECL Bought by Town & Country Bank & Trust CO dba First Bankers Trust CO
feed.summary: Town & Country Bank & Trust CO dba First Bankers Trust CO has acquired 4,650 shares of Ecolab Inc. (NYSE:ECL) stock, valued at approximately $1.273 million, during the third quarter. Other institutional investors like Norges Bank and Vanguard Group Inc. also made significant moves, with institutional ownership of Ecolab now standing at 74.91%. Ecolab recently increased its quarterly dividend, and analysts have set a consensus price target of $297.33, with an average "Moderate Buy" rating for the company.

feed.title: Townsquare Capital LLC Sells 24,650 Shares of Cisco Systems, Inc. $CSCO
feed.summary: Townsquare Capital LLC has reduced its stake in Cisco Systems by 17.7%, selling 24,650 shares but still retaining 114,930 shares valued at $7.86 million. Despite this, analysts have raised price targets on Cisco, with an average "Moderate Buy" rating and a price target of $86.81, following strong quarterly earnings and positive guidance. The company also declared a quarterly dividend of $0.41 per share, though insider transactions have seen over 1 million shares sold in the last 90 days.

feed.title: Here Are Friday’s Top Wall Street Analyst Research Calls: Broadcom, Circle Internet, Kenvue, Medtronic, Sandisk, Southwest Airlines, Spotify, and More
feed.summary: This article details Friday's top Wall Street analyst upgrades, downgrades, and initiations for various companies including Broadcom, Circle Internet, Kenvue, Medtronic, Sandisk, Southwest Airlines, and Spotify. It also provides an overview of pre-market stock futures, bond, oil, gold, and crypto markets, highlighting the impact of recent earnings reports and macroeconomic factors. The market insights reflect a shift to "risk-off" sentiment following disappointing earnings from Microsoft and broader market sell-offs.

feed.title: Townsquare Capital LLC Lowers Position in Wells Fargo & Company $WFC
feed.summary: Townsquare Capital LLC reduced its stake in Wells Fargo & Company by 12.0% in the third quarter, holding 82,083 shares valued at $6.88 million, making it their 21st largest position. Despite some negative sentiment like CEO Charlie Scharf's increased pay and recent price target trims, Wells Fargo shows positive developments in private-credit activity and its in-house voting system. The stock maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with a target price of $94.87 and announced a quarterly dividend of $0.45 per share.

feed.title: What Analysts Are Saying About Tapestry Stock
feed.summary: Fourteen analysts have evaluated Tapestry (NYSE: TPR) in the last quarter, resulting in an average price target of $136.43, a 3.52% increase from the previous average. The analysis details key analyst actions, ratings, and price target adjustments, providing insights into the financial experts' perceptions of the company. Tapestry's financial health indicators, such as its strong market capitalization, notable revenue growth, impressive net margin, high ROE, and ROA, are highlighted, though its high debt-to-equity ratio presents a challenge.

feed.title: Philip Morris International to Host Webcast of 2025 Fourth-Quarter and Full-Year Results
feed.summary: Philip Morris International (PMI) will host a live audio webcast on February 6, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. ET to discuss its 2025 Fourth-Quarter and Full-Year financial results. The webcast will feature CEO Jacek Olczak and CFO Emmanuel Babeau, offering insights into PMI's financial performance and its ongoing efforts to deliver a smoke-free future. The company continues to expand its portfolio with smoke-free products and has invested significantly in developing and commercializing these alternatives.

feed.title: Townsquare Capital LLC Sells 12,273 Shares of Medtronic PLC $MDT
feed.summary: Townsquare Capital LLC significantly reduced its stake in Medtronic PLC (NYSE:MDT) by 38.4% in the third quarter of 2025, selling 12,273 shares. Despite this, Medtronic reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst expectations with $1.36 EPS and $8.96 billion in revenue, and set a positive FY2026 EPS guidance. The company remains a significant holding for institutional investors, with 82.06% of its stock owned by such entities, including large positions from Vanguard Group Inc. and Norges Bank.

feed.title: McKesson Corporation Completes Divestiture of Norwegian Operations
feed.summary: McKesson Corporation announced it has completed the sale of its retail and distribution businesses in Norway to NorgesGruppen. This divestiture marks the final step in McKesson's exit from its European operations, allowing the company to concentrate its strategy and capital on expanding growth platforms in Oncology, Multispecialty, and Biopharma Services. Further details will be provided during the company's Fiscal Third Quarter Earnings call on February 4, 2026.

feed.title: Town & Country Bank & Trust CO dba First Bankers Trust CO Buys 23,073 Shares of American Electric Power Company, Inc. $AEP
feed.summary: Town & Country Bank & Trust CO dba First Bankers Trust CO significantly increased its stake in American Electric Power Company, Inc. (AEP) by 692.9% in Q3, now owning 26,403 shares valued at $2.97 million. This makes AEP the 29th biggest holding in their portfolio. The article also notes that an American Electric Power director sold 5,000 shares, and various other institutional investors have adjusted their holdings.

feed.title: Abbott stock price target lowered to $119 by Leerink on 4Q results
feed.summary: Leerink Partners has lowered its price target for Abbott Laboratories (NYSE:ABT) to $119 from $136 while maintaining a Market Perform rating, following the company's disappointing fourth-quarter results. Abbott's stock has underperformed significantly, falling 12% since earnings were reported, largely due to a revenue miss in its Nutrition segment and underperformance in other key areas. Despite potential growth drivers, Leerink expects the company to remain a "show-me" story for investors due to concerns about achieving its organic growth guidance and the uncertainties surrounding its recent $23 billion acquisition of EXAS.

feed.title: Leerink Partners raises Gilead Sciences stock price target to $146 on HIV pipeline
feed.summary: Leerink Partners has significantly increased its price target for Gilead Sciences (NASDAQ:GILD) to $146 from $114, maintaining an Outperform rating, due to strong confidence in its HIV pipeline, particularly the successful launch of Yeztugo. The firm anticipates positive revenue and earnings growth for Gilead in Q4 2025, driven by Yeztugo's commercial uptake and expanding access. This bullish outlook is further supported by Gilead's strong financial health, consistent dividend increases, and promising developments in its oncology segment.

feed.title: BMO Capital reiterates Outperform rating on Sherwin-Williams stock
feed.summary: BMO Capital has reiterated its Outperform rating and $420.00 price target for Sherwin-Williams (NYSE:SHW), indicating an 18% potential upside from its current price. The firm noted Sherwin-Williams' solid performance in 2025 and conservative guidance for 2026, positioning it well, especially with past investments. Despite a pre-market stock decline, the company surpassed Q4 2025 earnings and revenue expectations.

feed.title: ResMed stock holds steady as Needham reiterates Hold rating
feed.summary: Needham has reiterated its Hold rating on ResMed (NYSE:RMD) after the medical equipment manufacturer's fiscal second quarter 2026 results exceeded analyst expectations. ResMed reported improved organic revenue growth and higher gross and operating margins, along with plans for continued share repurchases. Despite a slight dip in aftermarket trading, the company's financial performance continues to align with market projections.
